title: Wood (disambiguation)
content:
'''Wood''' may refer to:

==Woods==
*[[Ayalayli thornwood/Legends|Ayalayli thornwood]], a sturdy type of wood
*[[Bega wood]], a type of wood from [[Begamor]]
*[[Boa-wood]], a type of wood used to make trunks
*[[Body-wood]], a pale pink luxury wood
*[[Borl wood]]
*[[Corellian hardwood]]
*[[Cosian wood/Legends|Cosian wood]], used in the [[Hilt/Legends|handle]] of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Tera Sinube/Legends|Tera Sinube's]] [[Tera Sinube's sabercane|lightsaber]]
*[[Greel wood/Legends|Greel wood]], a dark crimson wood used for furniture
*[[Homogoni]], an expensive wood used to make tables
*[[Ironwood]]
*[[Japor ivory wood]], a type of wood found on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]
*[[Kashyyyk-wood]], type of wood from [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]
*[[Kriin-wood/Legends|Kriin-wood]], an expensive, dark-colored wood from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]
*[[Laroon wood]], a rare type of wood used primarily in luxury settings
*[[Oro wood]], once-famous trees from Alderaan
*[[Quasiwood]], a wood used to make furniture
*[[Resinwood]], a type of wood from [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]]
*[[Roo-wood]], a wood used to make furniture
*[[Scentwood]], a wood used to make furniture
*[[Snow-wood]], a type of wood from [[Csilla/Legends|Csilla]]
*[[Teej wood]]
*[[Veshok wood]], an extremely hard wood from the [[Veshok|veshok tree]] on Mandalore

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
*[[Ashley Wood]], a ''[[Star Wars]]'' artist
*[[Brian Wood]], a comics author
*[[Keith Wood]], the colorist for "[[Mara Jade: A Night on the Town]]."
*[[Matthew Wood]], the Supervising Sound Editor at [[Skywalker Sound]] who voiced [[Grievous]] and [[B1-series battle droid]]s in films ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'', and ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]''.

{{Disambig}}
